title: hypericophyllum hessii
intro: Hypericophyllum hessii is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the blue devil or devil's claw. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Hypericophyllum hessii include relieving pain and muscle spasms, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for consumption.
